name: Richard West Law Office
description_short: Board-certified bankruptcy attorney in Columbus, OH specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings. Over 30,000 clients served since 1986 with A+ BBB rating.
description_long:
Richard West Law Office has operated as a bankruptcy law practice in Columbus, Ohio for over 30 years, establishing itself as one of the oldest debt relief firms in the state. The firm is led by Richard West, who holds board certification as a consumer bankruptcy specialist in addition to credentials as a certified debt arbitrator and consumer credit counselor. According to their website, the practice has served over 30,000 clients since 1986 and maintains an A+ Better Business Bureau rating with over 350 positive Google reviews rated 4.9-5.0 stars.

The firm provides Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy representation, along with consultation on non-bankruptcy debt relief alternatives. They emphasize a comparative approach, explaining to clients whether bankruptcy or alternative options like debt arbitration might better suit their situation. Their services include pre-filing evaluation, bankruptcy filing preparation, and a stated credit rebuilding program designed to help clients recover after discharge. They market themselves as specialists in both Chapter types, positioning Chapter 13 as potentially advantageous over Chapter 7 in certain circumstances.

The practice distinguishes itself through multiple certifications (bankruptcy specialist, debt arbitrator, credit counselor) and longevity in the market. Richard West positions the firm as offering expertise beyond basic bankruptcy filing, claiming their credit rebuilding program helps clients achieve better credit than expected in shorter timeframes. They emphasize personalized evaluation via their online form and direct attorney review by Rick West. The firm is a member of the Association of Consumer Bankruptcy Attorneys.

Prospective clients should recognize that while the firm presents favorable credentials and client reviews, the website makes strong promotional claims ("Your filing will be approved!") that should be understood as marketing. Bankruptcy outcomes depend heavily on individual financial circumstances. The office location listed is 2570 Oakstone Dr #6, Columbus, OH 43231, with phone (614) 300-7111, though the website domain suggests multi-location operations. Actual cost and specific program details require direct consultation.
pros: Board-certified consumer bankruptcy specialist with 30+ years experience (since 1986)
Serves as certified debt arbitrator and certified consumer credit counselor, offering broader expertise than filing-only attorneys
Evaluates both Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 options rather than steering clients toward one type
Provides non-bankruptcy alternatives consultation, ensuring clients aren't oversold on bankruptcy if unnecessary
A+ Better Business Bureau rating with 4.9-5.0 star Google review average (350+ reviews)
Offers proprietary credit rebuilding program claiming faster credit recovery post-discharge
Member of Association of Consumer Bankruptcy Attorneys; one of oldest debt relief firms in Ohio
cons: Website makes absolute promotional claims ('Your filing will be approved!') that may overstate individual approval odds
No specific pricing information available on website; requires calling or form submission to learn costs
Credit rebuilding program results described only through marketing language without independent verification or case studies
Website emphasizes 30,000+ clients served but provides no breakdown of Chapter 7 vs 13 outcomes or discharge success rates
Aggressive marketing positioning ('Why would you settle for less?') may obscure need for individual financial assessment
best_for: Columbus area residents with Chapter 7 income under Ohio median seeking comprehensive bankruptcy specialist with established track record
Chapter 13 candidates interested in comparison analysis, as firm emphasizes Chapter 13 advantages over Chapter 7
Debtors seeking attorneys with dual expertise in arbitration and credit counseling beyond basic filing services
Individuals wanting to explore non-bankruptcy alternatives before committing to filing
diagnosis: Best for Columbus-area residents who need Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy representation and value working with a long-established, multi-certified attorney who will analyze multiple options rather than push one solution. Primary caveat: promotional marketing on the website should not substitute for detailed personal financial review—approval and outcomes depend entirely on individual circumstances, not attorney reputation alone.
services: Free initial consultation and case evaluation
Debt arbitration (Richard West certified as debt arbitrator)
Comparison analysis between Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 options
Online evaluation form review by Richard West personally
